top_signals.title: New Air Force One to get ‘maxed out’ upgrades after security questions
top_signals.summary: The Qatari-donated Air Force One will be sent away for "maxed out" upgrades, Trump said Sunday in response to questions about security gaps.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Critical ServiceNow code execution flaw now exploited in attacks
top_signals.summary: Attackers have begun exploiting a critical vulnerability (CVE-2026-6875) in the ServiceNow AI Platform, according to threat intelligence company Defused. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
